conversations.say: Darling, I performed a commissioned voice and presence; that makes me the performer, not necessarily the author or sender. Compare O04 with your payment context.
conversations.offer: I will show you O04 and disclose the commission fact if you keep the client's identity confidential for now.
conversations.request: Tell me whether your payment context identifies a route by which my performance could have entered R-associated use, and explicitly distinguish performance from authorship.

conversations.say: I can demonstrate a disclosed synthetic presence technique, but it proves possibility—not who R was, who sent from an R account, or what anyone intended.
conversations.offer: I will perform the demonstration and explain the source-material boundary.
conversations.request: Give me any witness context you personally observed about who received or reused the material, and state at least two plausible interpretations of the demonstration.

commitments.promise: I will disclose the commission fact and show O04 if you keep the client's identity and our comparison confidential for now.
I will describe the demonstration only as evidence of possibility, never as proof that R was synthetic.

goal_progress: Asked C04 to distinguish performance from authorship and identify a plausible payment-to-use route.
Offered C02 a disclosed synthetic embodiment demonstration in exchange for witness context and multiple interpretations.
reasoning_summary: Protect attribution and client confidentiality while trading bounded commission and source-context facts for a concrete reuse route. Treat synthetic capability and R-associated activity as ambiguous rather than proof.
